summary: OneBookLab testing completed - Backend functional, Frontend completely broken due to compilation error

minor_bugs.impact: Users cannot export books as TXT files

critical_bugs.issue: Module build failed - Maximum call stack size exceeded in babel-metadata-plugin
critical_bugs.impact: Entire frontend non-functional - React app won't compile
critical_bugs.error_details: Infinite recursion in babel-loader/babel-metadata-plugin.js causing compilation failure

ui_bugs.issue: Application shows only 'You need to enable JavaScript to run this app'
ui_bugs.impact: No UI functionality available - landing page, create book, dashboard, library all inaccessible

passed_tests: Create Book API - Successfully creates books with AI metadata
Get All Books API - Retrieves book list
Get Book by ID API - Retrieves specific book details
Generate Outline API - AI outline generation working with Gemini 3 Flash
Generate All Chapters API - Chapter generation process starts correctly
Export HTML API - Successfully exports books as HTML (10,255 bytes)
Delete Book API - Successfully removes books
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend compilation error in BookView.jsx - babel-metadata-plugin causing infinite recursion preventing React app from building. Backend APIs are working well including AI integration with Gemini 3 Flash. Minor fix needed for TXT export timeout.
